hero.body: Every bite handcrafted with love — from showstopping celebration cakes to the perfect everyday indulgence.

about.label: Our Story
about.heading:
Every bite, 
thoughtfully made
about.body:
The Dough Knot began as a passion project in a home kitchen — a love for baking that slowly grew into something much more meaningful. What started with a handful of recipes and the joy of creating for family and friends has now become a space where creativity, precision, and passion come together.

Every cake, cookie, and pastry is handcrafted to order, ensuring freshness and a personal touch in every detail. From carefully selected ingredients to thoughtfully designed finishes, everything is made with intention — because great baking is never rushed.

At The Dough Knot, it’s not just about desserts. It’s about creating moments, celebrating occasions, and bringing people together over something truly special.

Every bite tells a story. Every creation is made with care.
Because you deserve nothing less than the best.

menu.note: All items baked fresh daily. Custom orders available with 48 hours notice.

baker.name:
Naurah
Nafeesa
baker.title: Pastry Chef & Founder
baker.bio: Naurah Nafeesa is a passionate and experienced baker whose love for pastry turned into a lifelong craft. A graduate of the prestigious Lavonne Academy of Baking Science and Pastry Arts in Bangalore, India, she has been creating extraordinary baked goods professionally since 2017 — first in India, and now bringing her expertise and heart to Dubai through The Dough Knot.
baker.school: Lavonne Academy of Baking Science and Pastry Arts

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: Ordered a birthday cake and it was absolutely stunning — the taste was even better than the look. Everyone at the party was asking where it came from!

testimonials.name: Fatima A.
testimonials.text: The brownies are addictive! We've ordered three times already. The Nutella ones are our family's favourite. Always fresh, always perfect.

testimonials.name: Lara K.
testimonials.text: Naurah made the most beautiful wedding dessert table for us. Every single item was delicious and the presentation was flawless. Highly recommend!
